user_system_path: Guardian pings only finished work (NO new paid LLM calls). (1) Gate the Slack send in runWorkdayPresenceTriggerRunner: when the intervention payload mode is 'silent' or 'dismissed', do not send Slack — record quiet. Stops the 'nothing prepared to act on yet' noise ping. (2) Seed a real presence draft from the latest already-generated daily-brief artifact in tkg_actions (pure mapping via draftFromArtifact-shape), attached to a draftless scored_winner state before the guardian evaluates — recycles generation the brief already paid for, zero new API calls. Prove with deterministic fixtures only (no live fire, no paid generation).
allowed_files_raw: only lib/workday-presence (trigger-runner Slack-send gate + a new pure draft-seed helper + their tests) + control-plane files. Do NOT touch the generator (lib/briefing, lib/conviction) — reuse the artifact it already produced.
forbidden_files_raw: No generator/LLM changes, no Slack/Stripe/auth routes, no schema, no deps, no paid generation calls.
required_local_proof: npm run lint && npx vitest run lib/workday-presence/__tests__ && npm run gate:continuity
required_browser_proof: N/A — server/runtime logic proven by deterministic fixtures (test-harness mode, owner directive: no paid API calls to prove this).
browser_proof_command: vitest fixtures: silent payload => no Slack send; fixture artifact => reviewable draft => active card
acceptance_condition: Guardian does NOT send Slack on a silent/dismissed payload; a draftless scored_winner gains a reviewable draft from the latest grounded tkg_actions artifact (no new generation) so the card renders active. Proven by deterministic vitest fixtures; no paid LLM calls.
anti_regression_checks: silent/dismissed payload never reaches Slack (only actionable cards ping)
draft-seed is a pure mapping from an existing artifact row — no new LLM/generator call
runner still fires + persists the grounded receipt; stays quiet safely with no state/draft
stop_condition: Stop when the silent-send gate + the no-paid draft-seed helper are built and proven by deterministic fixtures, with the runtime/live-fire proof explicitly deferred (owner: no paid test calls).
next_command: Build the silent-send gate in trigger-runner + a pure draft-seed-from-latest-artifact helper, wire it before evaluate, prove with vitest fixtures (no paid calls).
